title: Follow the Leader
writer: Ande Lamb, William Beaudine, Beryl Sachs
actors: Leo Gorcey, Huntz Hall, Gabriel Dell
plot: Muggs and Glimpy, two East Side Kids in the army, return to their neighborhood, supposedly on furlough; actually, Muggs has been honorably discharged with a physical defect, but he tells no one of this. Danny, another East Side ki...
